title: ZXPong Leaderboards
description: Understand known ZXPong leaderboard surfaces, including Longest Rally and shared ZX Series score and coin rankings.
summary: ZXPong leaderboard planning focuses on rally consistency and shared ZX Series progression surfaces.

sections.heading: Known leaderboards
paragraphs: Longest Rally is the primary Game Center leaderboard for ZXPong, rewarding players who can keep the ball in play the longest.
ZXPong also participates in shared ZX Series leaderboard surfaces such as total score and total coins through the shared ZX Series leaderboard model.

sections.heading: How to improve
paragraphs: For Longest Rally, prioritize safe returns and predictable paddle recovery.
Treat each session as a consistency attempt: the best leaderboard work usually comes from keeping several rallies stable rather than overplaying the first return.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXPong leaderboards
featureShowcases.summary: Leaderboards explain how score comparison fits into ZXPong.
body: This matters because arcade games are built around improvement. Leaderboards give players a clear reason to replay, refine inputs, and chase stronger results.
Players use this page after play to understand supported comparison surfaces and how leaderboard goals sit beside personal improvement.
bullets: Learn how score chasing to supported comparison.
Keeps competitive wording clear and player-facing.

image.caption: ZXPong leaderboard artwork supports score comparison and replay goals.
